span.p: R-01 Client asks Brain to recall

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
R-02 REST /memory/recall
or HTTP MCP brain_recall

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
R-05 stdio token and
user env valid?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
R-06 Scope Settings
to active user_id

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
R-07 Build RecallRequest
query, mode, limit,
include flags

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
R-09 Taste enabled and
query looks like
recommendation/ranking?

span.p:
R-10 TasteService.query
normalize intent and
extract option entities

span.p:
R-11 Retrieve taste candidates
from CogneePalateStore

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
R-12 Use past decision feedback
rank candidates
build grounding

R-13 Log palate decision
PalateDecisionDataPoint
via Cognee

R-14 Return RecallResponse
with taste answer,
facts, evidence

R-15 Resolve recall mode
explicit mode or infer
